sources.label: USGS Earthquakes

quality.limitations: Magnitude, location, and status can be revised by USGS.

sources.public_note: Informational earthquake context; follow official emergency authorities for safety instructions.

sources.label: ReliefWeb Humanitarian Reports
sources.provider: United Nations Office for the Coordination of Humanitarian Affairs

license.name: ReliefWeb terms; originating-content rights may vary
license.attribution: Source: ReliefWeb and the named originating organization

quality.limitations: Reports reflect named publishers and may differ in scope, verification, and publication timing.

sources.public_note: Humanitarian reporting metadata is preserved with publisher attribution and does not establish an independent factual determination.

sources.label: NOAA / National Weather Service

license.name: U.S. public domain unless specifically noted

coverage.geographic: United States and supported NOAA/NWS forecast locations
coverage.temporal: Active alerts and current forecast context

quality.limitations: The ticker is not an emergency-warning service; official alerts and local authorities remain authoritative.

sources.public_note: Weather summaries preserve official source links and should not replace NOAA/NWS alert products.

sources.label: NASA EONET Natural Events
sources.provider: NASA Earth Observatory Natural Event Tracker

coverage.temporal: Open-event snapshots and current category counts

quality.limitations: Event completeness and closure timing vary by source and category.

sources.public_note: Natural-event metadata is informational and retains links to the NASA EONET record.

sources.label: NASA POWER Observations
sources.provider: NASA Langley Research Center POWER Project

license.name: NASA scientific data usage and referencing guidance
license.attribution: NASA Langley Research Center POWER Project

quality.limitations: Values are contextual summaries near the configured point and are not local instrument readings or forecasts.

sources.public_note: Temperature, precipitation, and solar-resource context includes location and observation-window boundaries.

sources.label: OpenAlex Research

coverage.temporal: Recent open-access works matching configured topics

quality.limitations: Inclusion, citation counts, and open-access status are metadata signals and not quality or authority endorsements.

sources.public_note: Research items link to the underlying work or OpenAlex record and retain publication dates.

sources.label: World Bank Indicators

license.name: CC BY 4.0 for World Bank open datasets unless labeled otherwise

coverage.temporal: Periodic indicators with explicit data years

quality.limitations: Reporting years differ by indicator and are not real-time measurements.

sources.public_note: Every periodic value displays its data year and links to the indicator source page.

sources.label: Site Intelligence Platform Status

quality.limitations: Platform availability does not establish upstream source freshness or completeness.

sources.public_note: Optional quiet status signal; disabled in the WordPress ticker selection by default.
